summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of CivicPulse via Playwright covering all 3 roles (citizen/official/supervisor), public transparency, signup, AI-categorized report flow, maps, charts, notifications, Retell orb, and mobile responsiveness. 21/22 critical UI flows PASS. One environment-level UI issue: Retell orb button (z-40) is covered by the 'Made with Emergent' preview badge in the bottom-right, so a regular click is intercepted. The modal itself opens correctly when the click reaches the button (verified via JS click — Nova/Retell iframe loads as expected).

ui_bugs.issue: Orb button (fixed bottom-6 right-6, z-40) is overlapped by the 'Made with Emergent' badge at bottom-right of the preview environment. elementFromPoint over the orb returns an <A> tag (the Emergent badge link), so user pointer clicks land on the badge instead of the orb. Modal logic is correct — when the orb is clicked via JS, the modal opens and the retell iframe loads.

action_items: Raise Retell orb button's z-index from z-40 to z-50 (or higher) and consider repositioning slightly (e.g., bottom-20 right-6) so it doesn't sit under the Emergent preview badge. Right now end-users on the preview URL cannot click the orb.
critical_code_review_comments: RetellOrb.jsx: z-index conflict with preview-environment overlay. Suggest className `... z-50` on the button and `z-[60]` on the modal so they always sit above the Emergent badge.

IssueDetail.jsx: comment submit uses data-testid='comment-send-button' (not 'comment-submit-button' as one might expect by convention). Naming is fine, just noting for consistency with other forms which use *-submit-button.

Landing.jsx: hero text is split across three
-separated spans ('Your City.' / 'Your Voice.' / 'Real Accountability.'). Page renders fine on desktop and mobile (375px verified).
Made-with-Emergent badge will not exist in production, so this orb issue is preview-environment-only — but should still be fixed defensively because users explore preview URLs.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (21/22 flows green, 1 z-index issue on Retell orb)

test_credentials: Used seeded creds from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — aarav@civicpulse.in / ramesh.official@civicpulse.in / anjali.supervisor@civicpulse.in, all with password123. All three logins successful via demo buttons on /login.
seed_data_creation: Did not create explicit seed data. Test runs created some test issues ('Test Pothole UI', etc.) via the UI Report flow and one new account (test_pw_xxxxx@civicpulse.in) via signup. Safe to leave; non-destructive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major flows are GREEN. Specifically verified end-to-end: (1) Landing hero + counters + recent issues + orb visible. (2) Public /transparency renders 5 stat cards, 7-day line chart, category pie, ward bars, status bars, and Leaflet map with colored pins — no auth required. (3) Citizen login → dashboard with greeting 'Hi Aarav', 4 stat cards (Total/In Progress/Pending/Resolved), Report New Issue button. (4) Report flow: title+description triggers Gemini AI categorization (~3-6s) — AI ANALYSIS panel renders with summary + 'ROUTE → Public Works Department', category auto-selects 'Pothole', priority 'Critical'. Map picker click sets pin and shows lat/lon below map; 'Use my location' button present; submit redirects to /app/issues/<id>. (5) Issue detail: shows status badge, priority badge, AI ANALYSIS panel, single-pin map, reporter/assigned/upvotes stats, upvote button increments, comment input + send button persists comment. (6) My Issues lists 12 user issues with status badges. (7) City Map renders Leaflet + 25 pins. (8) Notification bell opens popover (unread count badge shown). (9) Logout returns to /login. (10) Official login → 'Officer Ramesh — your queue' with Assigned/In Progress/Overdue/Resolved Today stats and queue list. Official Issue detail shows OFFICIAL CONTROLS with Mark as acknowledged/in_progress/resolved/closed buttons; clicking transitions status. (11) Supervisor login → 'Command Center' with escalation banner ('14 issues require immediate escalation'), 5 stat cards (Total/Resolved/In Progress/SLA Breaches/Avg Resolution), city heatmap (Leaflet), 7-day trend chart, category mix, officials performance, ward breakdown. (12) /app/all-issues table with search filter (typing 'pothole' filters results). (13) /app/officials directory present with seeded officials. (14) Supervisor on issue detail sees 'Assign to official' UI. (15) Retell orb modal logic itself is CORRECT — Nova/Retell iframe loads — only blocked by z-index overlap with Emergent badge. (16) Signup creates new account and auto-logs in to /app. (17) Mobile 375px: landing renders correctly, hero, CTAs and counters visible; sidebar correctly hidden on mobile per md:flex.
rca of the issue: RetellOrb z-index conflict: orb has fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-40, but the preview environment injects a 'Made with Emergent' badge (an <a> element) at bottom-right with a higher stacking context. document.elementFromPoint over the orb center returns the <A> badge, so user clicks never fire the orb's onClick. Reproduction: open any /app/* page on the preview URL → try to click the green pulsing orb → nothing happens. Mitigation: bump RetellOrb button to className '... z-[60]' and modal to 'z-[70]' (or move orb up to bottom-24 right-6) so it sits above any environment overlays.
